name: multi-model-team
description: Marketplace for the multi-model-team plugin — delegate token-heavy work to a local agy (Gemini) CLI with dynamic routing, multi-agent /team fan-out, and a statusline HUD.

plugins.name: multi-model-team
plugins.description: Delegates token-heavy, self-contained tasks to a local pre-authed agy (Gemini) CLI, choosing backend/model by task size and type, with credit-exhaustion fallback to native Claude and a glanceable statusline HUD. /team runs a decompose → dispatch (parallel agy + native) → verify → fix → synthesize pipeline with per-backend caps, dependency ordering, and an Ultracode dynamic-workflow path. An optional, config-gated UserPromptSubmit hook can proactively nudge delegation of agy-routable prompts.
